mitigation: Visible checked_date/source panels; monthly source refresh; version-aware source registry.

risk: Site gives impression of formal approval
mitigation: Every tool result uses likely route/next steps wording, not approval guarantee wording.

risk: England guidance accidentally applied to other UK nations
mitigation: Jurisdiction field required; Scotland/Wales/NI pages either separate or noindex/draft until sourced.
No-thin-page publishing gate; candidate pages remain draft/noindex until completed.

risk: Approved Document L/F 2026 transition dates mishandled
mitigation: Version-aware energy/ventilation pages; cite AD L 2026 and Circular 01/2026; source freshness gate.

risk: Higher-risk building cases routed through homeowner simplification flow
mitigation: Hard stop to BSR/specialist route when HRB signals appear.
Planning content remains summary only; detailed planning pages live on UKPlanningGuide.
Plain local-only notice; no account/server claims unless actually implemented.
Each printable includes generated date and source re-check note.
Static-first, no-login, no monetisation until traffic and trust layer are established.
